tasks.title: Fintech Color Palette CSS Variables
tasks.description: Update globals.css with new fintech color palette. Replace default zinc theme with Navy/Gold enterprise gateway palette. Define colors in HSL format for both light and dark modes including primary (#1E40AF), accent (#10B981), warning (#F59E0B), destructive (#EF4444), and surface colors.
acceptance_criteria: All fintech colors defined as CSS variables in HSL format
Light mode palette complete with proper contrast
Chart colors defined for data visualization
test_cases: Variables render correctly in browser dev tools
Dark mode toggle switches all colors properly
Text contrast meets WCAG AAA (4.5:1 minimum)
tasks.definition_of_done: All color variables defined, both modes working, contrast verified
tasks.expected_output: Updated globals.css with complete fintech color system

tasks.title: IBM Plex Font Integration
tasks.description: Add IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono fonts via next/font/google. Configure font variables (--font-sans, --font-mono) and update Tailwind fontFamily configuration. Remove Inter font references.
acceptance_criteria: IBM Plex Sans loads with weights 300-700
IBM Plex Mono loads with weights 400-600
test_cases: Fonts load correctly on page load
font-sans class applies IBM Plex Sans
font-mono class applies IBM Plex Mono
Network tab shows font loading with display:swap
tasks.definition_of_done: Fonts load correctly, Tailwind configured, no CLS
tasks.expected_output: Updated layout.tsx with font imports, updated tailwind.config.ts

tasks.title: Elevation Shadow System
tasks.description: Add custom shadow scale to Tailwind config: shadow-xs, shadow-sm, shadow-md, shadow-lg, shadow-xl, shadow-2xl. Define subtle fintech-appropriate shadows with proper opacity for dark mode.
test_cases: Dark mode shadows don't look washed out
tasks.definition_of_done: All shadow levels defined and tested in both modes

tasks.title: Border Radius Scale
tasks.description: Extend Tailwind border radius with fintech-appropriate values. Add radius-sm (4px), radius (8px), radius-md (12px), radius-lg (16px), radius-xl (24px), radius-full. Update CSS variable --radius.
acceptance_criteria: Complete radius scale in Tailwind config

tasks.title: Animation Keyframes Library
tasks.description: Add animation keyframes to globals.css and Tailwind config: shimmer (for skeletons), fade-in, slide-up, slide-down, pulse-subtle, scale-in. Configure animation utilities in Tailwind.
test_cases: animate-fade-in fades element from 0 to 1 opacity
tasks.definition_of_done: All animations defined and testable via utility classes
tasks.expected_output: Updated globals.css with keyframes, tailwind.config.ts with animation utilities

tasks.title: Reduced Motion Support
tasks.description: Add prefers-reduced-motion media query to globals.css that disables all animations and transitions for users who prefer reduced motion. Ensure accessibility compliance.
acceptance_criteria: Skeleton shimmer stops for reduced motion
No visual breakage when motion disabled
test_cases: Enable reduced motion in OS settings
Verify UI still looks correct without motion
tasks.definition_of_done: Reduced motion fully supported, WCAG compliant
tasks.expected_output: Updated globals.css with reduced motion media query

phases.name: Core Components
phases.description: Refactor base UI primitives to match design system

tasks.title: Button Component Refactor
tasks.description: Enhance Button component with: isLoading prop with spinner, success variant (green), improved focus rings with ring-offset, better disabled state styling, icon positioning improvements.
acceptance_criteria: isLoading prop shows Loader2 spinner and disables button
Success variant added with accent color
Disabled state has 50% opacity and no pointer events
test_cases: Focus visible ring appears on keyboard focus
tasks.definition_of_done: All variants work, loading state implemented, tests pass
tasks.expected_output: Updated button.tsx with new variants and loading state

tasks.title: Card Component Enhancement
tasks.description: Add elevation prop (1-4) to Card for shadow levels, hover state variant with scale/shadow transition, optional gradient border variant. Improve CardHeader, CardContent spacing.
acceptance_criteria: Hover variant adds subtle lift effect
tasks.definition_of_done: Elevation system working, hover states smooth, tests pass
tasks.expected_output: Updated card.tsx with elevation and hover variants

tasks.title: Input Component Refactor
tasks.description: Add icon slots (left and right) to Input, validation states (error border/text, success border), size variants (sm, default, lg). Improve focus ring styling.
acceptance_criteria: Left icon slot with proper padding
Right icon slot with proper padding
Size variants change height and text size
tasks.definition_of_done: Icons, validation states, and sizes all working
tasks.expected_output: Updated input.tsx with icon slots and validation states

tasks.title: Badge Component Enhancement
tasks.description: Add new variants to Badge: success (green), warning (yellow), info (blue). Add dot indicator option, pill shape option. Improve typography and padding.
acceptance_criteria: Dot indicator option (small circle before text)
test_cases: Text is readable in all variants
tasks.definition_of_done: All new variants working, dot and pill options available
tasks.expected_output: Updated badge.tsx with new variants and options

tasks.title: Avatar Component Enhancement
tasks.description: Enhance Avatar with size variants (xs, sm, md, lg, xl), online status indicator (green dot), fallback initials generation, improved border styling.
tasks.definition_of_done: Sizes, indicator, and fallback all working
tasks.expected_output: Updated avatar.tsx with variants and features

tasks.title: Skeleton Component Creation
tasks.description: Create Skeleton component with shimmer animation, variants for text (multiple lines), circle (avatars), and rectangle (cards). Support custom width/height.
test_cases: Text skeleton shows 3 lines by default
tasks.definition_of_done: All skeleton variants working with shimmer animation

tasks.title: Alert Component Enhancement
tasks.description: Improve Alert with new color variants matching semantic colors, icon support in the left side, optional close button, improved typography.
tasks.definition_of_done: All variants, icon, and close button working

tasks.title: Table Component Enhancement
tasks.description: Improve Table with hover row effect, sticky header option, loading state with skeleton rows, improved dark mode styling, zebra stripe option.
acceptance_criteria: Row hover effect subtle but visible

tasks.title: Admin Sidebar Redesign
tasks.description: Redesign admin sidebar with collapsible state (icons only when collapsed), improved hover/active states, section dividers, logo area, user avatar at bottom.
tasks.definition_of_done: Sidebar fully functional with collapse, tests pass

tasks.title: Portal Sidebar Redesign
tasks.description: Redesign portal sidebar to match admin styling with user-specific elements: user avatar section at bottom, wallet status indicator, simplified navigation for end users.
acceptance_criteria: User avatar and name at bottom

tasks.title: PageHeader Component Creation
tasks.description: Create reusable PageHeader component with breadcrumbs, title, description, and actions slot for buttons. Support for back button option.
acceptance_criteria: Actions slot for buttons on right

tasks.title: PageContainer Component Creation
tasks.description: Create PageContainer wrapper with max-width constraint (1400px), responsive padding, and proper margins for content below fixed headers.
acceptance_criteria: Proper top margin for fixed headers

tasks.title: Admin Layout Refinement
tasks.description: Update admin layout to use new sidebar, add smooth transitions, improve spacing, ensure no content hidden under fixed elements.
tasks.definition_of_done: Admin layout using new components, responsive

tasks.title: Portal Layout Refinement
tasks.description: Update portal layout with new sidebar, mobile-first design improvements, smooth transitions, proper spacing for all viewport sizes.

tasks.title: StatCard Component Creation
tasks.description: Create StatCard component with icon slot, large value display, label, trend indicator (up/down percentage), optional sparkline, loading skeleton state.

tasks.title: ChartContainer Component Creation
tasks.description: Create ChartContainer wrapper for Recharts with consistent theming, title/description, loading state, error state, theme-aware colors.

tasks.title: Enhanced DataTable Component
tasks.description: Create enhanced DataTable component with sortable columns, filter row, pagination, row selection checkboxes, loading skeleton rows, empty state.

tasks.title: ActivityFeed Component Creation
tasks.description: Create ActivityFeed component with timeline layout, status icons per item, timestamps, expandable details, vertical connector line.

tasks.title: KPICard Component Creation
tasks.description: Create KPICard for large metric display with trend arrow, comparison text (vs last period), optional mini chart, emphasis styling.

tasks.title: StatusBadge Component Creation
tasks.description: Create specialized StatusBadge for transaction/intent statuses (PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED, REVERSED) with semantic colors and icons.
acceptance_criteria: All status types mapped to colors

tasks.title: QuickStats Grid Component
tasks.description: Create QuickStats component for responsive grid layout of StatCards with consistent gap spacing, responsive columns.

tasks.title: RecentActivity Table Component
tasks.description: Create RecentActivity component combining DataTable styling with StatusBadge for recent transactions/intents display.

phases.name: Portal Components
phases.description: Create portal-specific components for end users

tasks.title: WalletCard Component Creation
tasks.description: Create premium WalletCard with gradient background option, wallet address with copy button, deployed status badge, network indicator.

tasks.title: BalanceDisplay Component Creation
tasks.description: Create BalanceDisplay component with VND/crypto formatting, available/locked breakdown, optional refresh button, loading skeleton.

tasks.title: TransactionRow Component Creation
tasks.description: Create TransactionRow component for transaction list items with type icon, amount with color coding, status badge, timestamp, optional expand.
acceptance_criteria: Amount green for credit, red for debit

tasks.title: KYCProgress Component Creation
tasks.description: Create KYCProgress step indicator (1-4 steps) with current step highlight, completion checkmarks, step labels, responsive layout.

tasks.title: DepositCard Component Creation
tasks.description: Create DepositCard for deposit flow with method selection, amount input, instructions panel, QR code slot, confirmation button.

tasks.title: WithdrawCard Component Creation
tasks.description: Create WithdrawCard for withdraw flow with asset selection, amount input with max button, destination input, fee display, confirmation.

tasks.title: AssetRow Component Creation
tasks.description: Create AssetRow for asset list with asset icon, name, balance display, optional sparkline, action buttons (Deposit, Withdraw).
tasks.definition_of_done: AssetRow displays asset info in list

tasks.title: QuickActions Component Creation
tasks.description: Create QuickActions button grid for common actions (Deposit, Withdraw, Trade, etc.) with icons and labels, responsive layout.

phases.name: Page Refactors
phases.description: Refactor all pages to use new components

tasks.title: Admin Dashboard Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor admin dashboard to use QuickStats, StatCard, ChartContainer, RecentActivity components. Replace inline styles with component-based design.

tasks.title: Intents Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor intents page with DataTable, StatusBadge, PageHeader. Add filtering and sorting capabilities.

tasks.title: Users Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor users page with DataTable, Avatar, Badge, PageHeader. Add user detail expandable rows.

tasks.title: Compliance Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor compliance page with DataTable, ActivityFeed, KPICard. Add case management UI improvements.
tasks.definition_of_done: Compliance page refactored with new components

tasks.title: Ledger Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor ledger page with enhanced DataTable styling, balance columns, entry type badges.
tasks.definition_of_done: Ledger page uses new table styling

tasks.title: Webhooks Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor webhooks page with DataTable, StatusBadge for delivery status.

tasks.title: Admin Settings Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor settings page with improved form styling, section cards, save buttons.
tasks.definition_of_done: Settings page uses new form styling

tasks.title: Portal Dashboard Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor portal dashboard with WalletCard, BalanceDisplay, QuickActions. Premium landing experience for users.
tasks.definition_of_done: Portal dashboard uses all new components

tasks.title: Portal Assets Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor assets page with AssetRow list, BalanceDisplay totals.
tasks.definition_of_done: Assets page shows all user assets

tasks.title: Portal Deposit Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor deposit page with DepositCard component, improved instructions.

tasks.title: Portal Withdraw Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor withdraw page with WithdrawCard component, validation feedback.

tasks.title: Portal Transactions Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor transactions page with TransactionRow list, filters, date range.

tasks.title: Portal KYC Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor KYC page with KYCProgress, improved form sections, document upload.
tasks.definition_of_done: KYC page guides user through verification

tasks.title: Portal Settings Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor portal settings with profile section, security section, notification preferences.

tasks.title: Portal Login Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor login page with premium card design, brand styling, WebAuthn option, smooth transitions.
tasks.definition_of_done: Login page looks premium and works

tasks.title: Portal Register Page Refactor
tasks.description: Refactor register page matching login styling, terms checkbox, confirmation.

tasks.title: Dark Mode Audit and Fixes
tasks.description: Audit all pages and components for dark mode issues. Fix any contrast, visibility, or styling problems.
test_cases: Toggle dark mode on all pages
tasks.definition_of_done: Dark mode looks premium on all pages

tasks.title: Accessibility Audit and Fixes
tasks.description: Run accessibility audit, fix focus states, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, contrast issues.

tasks.title: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize bundle size, add lazy loading for heavy components, run Lighthouse audit, fix performance issues.

parallel_opportunities: T-002, T-003, T-004, T-005 can run in parallel
Phase 2 and Phase 3 can run in parallel after Phase 1
Phase 4 and Phase 5 can run in parallel after Phases 2-3
